title: Yann LeCun - NYU Center for Data Science
text:
# Member Profile

## Yann LeCun

Professor of Computer Science, Neural Science, Data Science, and Electrical and Computer Engineering

**Research Areas:**

* Machine learning
* Computer vision
* Mobile robotics
* Computational neuroscience

**Awards:**

* Association for the Advancement of Artificial Intelligence Fellowship; Chevalier in the French Legion of Honor (2020)
* Harold Pender Award, Innovative Research Interchange Medal, Turing Award (2018)
* IEEE PAMI (Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence) Distinguished Researcher Award (2015)
* American Association for the Advancement of Science (AAAS) Fellowship; Princess of Asturias Award for Technical and Scientific Research; Université Côte D Azur, Honorary Doctorate (2022)
* Doctorate Honoris Causa from Università di Siena (2023)
* French Academy of Sciences; National Academy of Science (2021)
* IEEE CIS Neural Networks Pioneer Award (2014)
* Instituto Politecnico Nacional De Mexico Doctorate Honoris Causa (2016)
* National Academy of Engineering (2017)

**[Link to Yann LeCun’s Website](https://yann.lecun.com/)**
